ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor of the state */,
  "state_historical_population" INTEGER /* Historical population of the state */,
  "state_historical_area_sq_km" REAL /* Historical area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the state data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county is in */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_historical_population" INTEGER /* Historical population of the county */,
  "county_historical_area_sq_km" REAL /* Historical area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the county data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the city is in */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "city_historical_population" INTEGER /* Historical population of the city */,
  "city_historical_area_sq_km" REAL /* Historical area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the city data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race category */,
  "race_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population for the race category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the race category data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range of income for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income category */,
  "income_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population for the income category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the income category data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unemployment rate category */,
  "rate_range" TEXT /* Range of unemployment rate for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unemployment rate category */,
  "unemployment_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population for the unemployment rate category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the unemployment rate data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty rate category */,
  "rate_range" TEXT /* Range of poverty rate for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the poverty rate category */,
  "poverty_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population for the poverty rate category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the poverty rate data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_categories" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing category */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., single-family, multi-family) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the housing category */,
  "housing_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the total population for the housing category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the housing category data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ZIP code the housing data is for */,
  "total_housing_units" INTEGER /* Total number of housing units in the ZIP code */,
  "median_year_structure_built" INTEGER /* Median year the structures were built */,
  "median_value_housing_units" INTEGER /* Median value of housing units in dollars */,
  "total_occupied_housing_units" INTEGER /* Total number of occupied housing units in the ZIP code */,
  "total_vacant_housing_units" INTEGER /* Total number of vacant housing units in the ZIP code */,
  "median_rent" INTEGER /* Median rent for housing units in the ZIP code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the housing data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ZIP code the demographic data is for */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the ZIP code */,
  "male" INTEGER /* Number of males in the ZIP code */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Number of females in the ZIP code */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race category */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the ZIP code */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the demographic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES race_categories ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ZIP code the economic data is for */,
  "household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "per_capita_income" INTEGER /* Per capita income */,
  "poverty_count" INTEGER /* Number of people living in poverty */,
  "poverty_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poverty rate category */,
  "unemployment_count" INTEGER /* Number of people unemployed */,
  "unemployment_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unemployment rate category */,
  "total_businesses" INTEGER /* Total number of businesses in the ZIP code */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the ZIP code */,
  "average_business_income" INTEGER /* Average income of businesses in the ZIP code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the economic data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_unemployment_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("unemployment_rate_id") REFERENCES unemployment_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_poverty_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("poverty_rate_id") REFERENCES poverty_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ZIP code being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the ZIP code data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the ZIP code data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "request_duration" REAL /* Duration of the request in seconds */,
  "response_size" INTEGER /* Size of the response in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
